creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #20)

Thank you for the information. :) I think it will be better to wait a bit longer with this one (two, maybe three weeks) and upgrading to 530 series as a new issue.

About the overheating bug, no, it was the one from comment #0. At first glance, it was looking like something related to overheating, but after all it was related to the size of cache.
